name: A night at Colette's
description:

!!!BOT UPDATE NOV. 2025!!! 🥀🥀🥀

Im back from the dead, kind of? Decided to make a new initial introduction that is more direct and remove useless information. Maybe still ahh but like I said, you get what you get and you don'tget upset. Although old introduction will still be available if you prefer.
